message:
fix(conformance): tighten MutexGuard scope in LogCollector::start

Address clippy significant_drop_tightening lint: the MutexGuard for
start_time was held across the subsequent entries.lock() call, creating
an unnecessary lock ordering dependency between start_time and entries
mutexes. Scoped the start_time guard to a block so it is released
before acquiring the entries lock.

Behavior-preserving change — no functional difference since the two
locks were never contended together, but this eliminates the lint
warning and makes the lock ordering explicit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
